name: Do I need lawyer for simple slip at work comp?

mainEntity.name: Do I need lawyer for simple slip at work comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, even simple claims benefit from lawyers who increase payouts 2-3x and handle denials.** Free consult, no win no fee.[1] Key factors: (1) Insurers lowball; (2) Navigate rules; (3) Permanent ratings higher. Many settle wrong without help. Call experienced one.
